name: Burning Man - Mutant Vehicles (Art Cars)
start_date: Late August (Monday before Labor Day, annual)
street_address: Black Rock Desert, Pershing County, NV 89405
description: Burning Man's Mutant Vehicles (formerly art cars) are licensed, radically modified vehicles — cars, trucks, boats, and custom fabrications — that are permitted to roam Black Rock City during the annual Burning Man festival. Vehicles must be strikingly, safely, and radically modified. The Burning Man Project registers and licenses all mutant vehicles. Burning Man is held annually from late August through Labor Day in the Black Rock Desert, Nevada.
